beats: Camera slowly zooms into the photo
A woman stands in the corner of the photo
Her face is scratched out like rain streaks

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 照片角落站着一个女人，脸被雨水一样的划痕抹掉。

prompt.positive: Extreme close-up of an old photo on a wooden table, a woman's silhouette in the corner, her face obscured by vertical scratch marks resembling rain, dim warm light, melancholic mood, shallow depth of field, cinematic
prompt.negative: sharp face details, bright, happy colors, modern
